title: Range Sum of Sorted Subarray Sums
hints: Given the constraint n <= 1000, an O(n^2) approach to generate all subarray sums is feasible. Do you need a complex algorithm to find them?
Generate all contiguous subarray sums, store them in a single list, and sort that list in non-decreasing order.
Access the sorted list using 0-based indices (left-1 to right-1), sum those elements, and apply modulo 10^9 + 7 to the final result.
